_routing_note: Roster sheet URL + admin endpoint live on truesight.me/programs/<slug>/manifest.json. Fetch that manifest at runtime to discover roster_sheet_url and tokenomics_admin_endpoint.

cert_template._note: Replace cert_template/cert_template.pdf + logo.png + fonts/ with your program's design. cert_config.json overlay coordinates may need to change too — see lineage-engine cert_overlay convention.

_trust_source_note: Trust circle = whoever is an editor on the roster sheet. Both the admin panel (auth gate) and the central tokenomics handler (signature verification) resolve via the central tokenomics GAS endpoint's list_sheet_editors&sheet_url=... action. No per-program GAS proxy deployment; no static authorized_attestors[] list.
